about.title: KARDRA
about.text1: Kardra develops automation solutions to turn manual processes into faster, clearer, and more scalable systems.
about.text2: We work with ready-to-implement products and personalized services, depending on the needs of each operation.

contact.title: CONTACT KARDRA
contact.text: Tell us what process you want to automate and let's talk about the best way to solve it.

form.name: Name
form.message: What process do you want to automate?

items.q: Does Kardra offer products or services?
items.a: Both. Kardra offers ready-to-implement products (pre-built automations) and personalized services (automations designed for your operation). You can choose one or combine both.
It depends on what you choose. Products are pre-built solutions for common processes. Services are fully customized based on how your business works.

items.q: Can a solution be implemented without changing the entire operation?
items.a: Yes. We work modularly. You can start by automating one specific process without transforming your entire operation from the start.

items.q: How do I know if I need a product or a service?
items.a: If your process is common (expense management, income tracking, reports), a product may work. If your process has particularities specific to your business, a personalized service is more appropriate. We can guide you before you decide.

items.q: Can I reach out before deciding?
items.a: Absolutely. That's what we recommend. Tell us what process you want to automate and we'll explain which option makes the most sense for your case.

footer.tagline: Turn manual processes into automatic systems.
